title: Multi-Agent Health Intelligence System
tagline: 6-agent WhatsApp health triage system for low-resource clinical environments
problem: Patients in low-resource environments lack access to consistent medical triage, leading to delayed diagnoses and preventable deterioration.
solution: 6-agent AI architecture orchestrated via LangGraph. Triage, symptom analysis, prescription lookup, escalation, follow-up, and audit agents working in sequence. WhatsApp as the delivery layer — zero app install for patients.
impact: 78 test cases validated. Full HIPAA-aligned audit trail. Flagged for potential deployment through community health programs.
